sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a history of carpal tunnel release and chronic back pain. He also describes recent onset of significant knee pain, particularly with patellar inhibition, and reports increased discomfort with swimming. He has a history of depression and is currently taking medication and attending therapy. He denies any injury to the knee and reports no leg pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals no joint swelling in the knee. The heart rhythm is regular, lungs are clear, and thyroid exam is normal. Grip strength is equal bilaterally. X-ray of the right knee is normal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has chondromalacia of the patella, chronic back pain, and depression.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Start ibuprofen 600 mg four times daily with food. Prescribe straight leg raising exercises. Continue current antidepressant medication and therapy. Schedule follow-up in 2 weeks to assess response to treatment.
